testcase.name: ChatService > sendMessage > should send message successfully and return response
ChatService > sendMessage > should throw error for 400 Bad Request
ChatService > sendMessage > should throw error for 404 Not Found
ChatService > sendMessage > should throw error for 503 Service Unavailable
ChatService > sendMessage > should throw generic error for other HTTP errors
ChatService > sendMessage > should throw connection error when fetch fails
ChatService > sendMessage > should handle empty response message
GoogleCalendarService > isGoogleConnected > should return false when no token exists
GoogleCalendarService > isGoogleConnected > should return false when token is expired
GoogleCalendarService > isGoogleConnected > should return true when token is valid
GoogleCalendarService > isGoogleConnected > should return false when token exists but no expiry
GoogleCalendarService > disconnectGoogle > should revoke token and clear localStorage
GoogleCalendarService > disconnectGoogle > should clear localStorage even when no token exists
GoogleCalendarService > getGoogleConnectionStatus > should return connected status with email
GoogleCalendarService > getGoogleConnectionStatus > should return disconnected status
GoogleCalendarService > getGoogleConnectionStatus > should return connected without email if email not stored
GoogleCalendarService > ActivityEvent type > should accept valid activity event
GoogleCalendarService > ActivityEvent type > should accept activity event without optional fields
RecommendationService > respondToRecommendation > should send ACCEPTED response successfully
RecommendationService > respondToRecommendation > should send REJECTED response successfully
RecommendationService > respondToRecommendation > should handle network error
RecommendationService > respondToRecommendation > should handle 404 error (recommendation not found)
RecommendationService > respondToRecommendation > should handle 500 server error
RecommendationService > respondToRecommendation > should handle 401 error and redirect to login when no refresh token
RecommendationService > respondToRecommendation > should retry after successful token refresh
RecommendationService > respondToRecommendation > should handle generic error with custom message
RecommendationService > updateToken > should update authentication token
MediaPipe and fast-check setup > should have fast-check available
MediaPipe and fast-check setup > should verify fast-check works with a simple property
MediaPipe and fast-check setup > should have MediaPipe types available
gestureDetector > euclideanDistance > should calculate distance between two identical points as 0
gestureDetector > euclideanDistance > should calculate distance in 2D (z=0)
gestureDetector > euclideanDistance > should calculate distance in 3D
gestureDetector > euclideanDistance > should calculate distance with normalized coordinates (0-1)
gestureDetector > euclideanDistance > should be symmetric (distance(p1,p2) = distance(p2,p1))
gestureDetector > calculateReferenceDistance > should calculate distance between wrist (0) and middle MCP (9)
gestureDetector > calculateReferenceDistance > should calculate reference distance in 3D
gestureDetector > calculateReferenceDistance > should work with realistic hand landmarks
gestureDetector > normalizedDistance > should normalize distance by reference distance
gestureDetector > normalizedDistance > should return value > 1 when distance exceeds reference
gestureDetector > normalizedDistance > should return value < 1 when distance is less than reference
gestureDetector > normalizedDistance > should detect extended finger (normalized distance > 0.6)
gestureDetector > normalizedDistance > should detect closed finger (normalized distance < 0.3)
gestureDetector > normalizedDistance > should be independent of hand size with proper reference
gestureDetector > Integration - Complete gesture detection flow > should correctly normalize distances for gesture detection
activityChatParse > parseActivityFromText > détecte une formation et le titre après le mot formation
activityChatParse > parseActivityFromText > détecte certification et priorité haute
activityChatParse > parseActivityFromText > extrait une compétence présente dans le texte
activityChatParse > generateRecommendations > ajoute une reco pour gros groupe
activityChatParse > generateRecommendations > ajoute une reco pour formation
activityChatParse > generateManagerMessage > produit sujet et corps
activityChatParse > parseFieldCompletion > parse champ: valeur
activityChatParse > parseFieldCompletion > retourne null si pas de préfixe attendu
